name: Reset
comment: Reset: SEI; no $4020 write (no VS protection); wait 2 VBlanks; SP=$7F; JSR Init; STA $4F/$50=0; JSR DrawTitleScreen; STA $4B=0; then MainLoop

name: MainLoop
comment: MainLoop: JSR SetupNametableStage; JSR TitleWaitLoop; JSR PlayerSelectLoop; JSR StagePlay; JSR GameOverLoop; JMP MainLoop

name: StageStartSetup
comment: StageStartSetup: if $4B=0 → JSR ConstructionSetup; LDA $85; JSR $F000 (load stage tilemap); JSR $CAF5 (HUD); then JSR $C331 (SpawnPlayersInit); GAME LOOP at $C1F9: WaitVBlank; JSR $C2E6/$E23B/$E0D8/$DEA6; check Start to pause; JSR $C728 CheckGameOver; BEQ loop back. Exits to stage-clear / game-over handling.

name: GameVarsInit
comment: GameVarsInit: clears $0101/$0102; STA $66=$67=$4C=0; STA $51=$52=$6A=3; if 1P ($83=0) STA $52=0; STA $85=1; STA $46=0; RTS. Sub of NewGameSetup region.

name: StageStartInit
comment: StageStartInit: JSR ClearStageCCData; JSR ClearEntitySlots; set $0106/$0108; spawn P1 (if $51!=0) and P2 (if $52!=0) via SpawnEnemy; STA $7F=$80=20 (enemies=20); clear $8F/$0A/$4B/$45/$6F/$70/$89/$8A/$82/$86/$0100/$6A; JSR $C71E/$C8C0/WaitVBlank/$C830/$C859/$E42B; set $68=$80/$0312=$4C=1; calc SpawnDelayBase: $84=$BE-(stage*4); 2P: $84-=$14.

name: StagePlay
comment: StagePlay: sets $6D=1 (game active); $4D=0; JSR GameVarsInit; STA $52=3; clears $4F/$50/$0A/$0B; JSR ConstructionSetup; JSR $F000(A=$FF) blank map; STA $85=$1E; STA $46=2; draws STAGE sprites; JSR InitEntities; JSR WaitNMI; JSR StageStartInit; JSR DrawHUDInit; JSR WaitVBlank; falls into ResetEntitySlots ($6C=5); RTS.

name: GameOverLoop
comment: GameOverLoop: WaitVBlank; if Start/Select pressed ($08 & $0C) → exit; JSR $C642; JSR GameTickMain ($C2E6); JSR $E23B; JSR $DEA6; JSR $E0D8; JSR $C728; BEQ loop. Post-game animation/wait loop.

name: DevSignature2
comment: DevSignature2: ASCII "TAKEFUMI HYOUDOU JUNKO OZAWA" — additional developer names

name: ConstructionMainLoop
comment: ConstructionMainLoop: init cursor entity $90/$98/$A0=$84; loop: d-pad movement ($C6D2); A=place tile ($C6C6); B=cycle tile type $5C(0-13); Start=exit

name: ConstructionAITarget
comment: ConstructionAITarget: scans entities for active target; calls CalcDirToTarget($DDA2); maps via $C6C2 table → direction bits $06/$08

name: ConstructionDirTable
comment: ConstructionDirTable[4]: direction byte lookup indexed by CalcDirToTarget result

name: PlaceTileBlockFromCursor
comment: PlaceTileBlockFromCursor: LDA $5C AND #$0F; JSR PlaceTileBlock($D80B) at ($90

name: ConstructionCursorMove
comment: ConstructionCursorMove: d-pad held→$7B counter(threshold $14=20fr); calls $E451; moves ×16px via ShovelTileDX/DY

name: ClearKillCounts
comment: ClearKillCounts: X=7→0; STA $73
column6: X=0; clears P1/P2 per-type kill counts ($73-$7A)

name: ConstructionConfigDisplay
comment: ConstructionConfigDisplay: draws score digits; A(+$10)/B(DEC)/Select(INC) adjust $0109

name: CheckGameOver
comment: CheckGameOver: if $68=0 (eagle destroyed) → show explosion sprite → RTS A=1; if $80=0 (no enemies on screen) → RTS A=1 (stage clear); if $51+$52=0 (all lives lost) → RTS A=1 (game over); else RTS A=0 (continue).

name: DrawHUDScores
comment: DrawHUDScores (tentative): called after WaitVBlank in stage start

name: DrawHUDLives
comment: DrawHUDLives (tentative): called after DrawHUDScores in stage start

name: InitStageHUD
comment: InitStageHUD (tentative): called from StageStartInit

name: DrawHUDInit
comment: DrawHUDInit: draws 4 HUD strings to nametable at rows $18-$1B column $0C; also puts a sprite (tile $23/$F3) into OAM via $0180+$0C; clears $07F3; masks $07F4 & $CC; RTS.

name: TitleWaitLoop
comment: TitleWaitLoop: clears $4F/$50; loops WaitVBlank + INC $4F; checks $08 AND #$04 (SELECT new press); if no press and $4F<$F0 (240 frames)

name: PlayerSelectLoop
comment: PlayerSelectLoop: $4D=3; SELECT(bit2/$08)=INC $83 (cycle 0→1→2→0: 1P/2P/CONSTRUCTION); cursor blink every 4 frames; P1-DOWN+P2-A → $4A+=16 (stage skip cheat); P1-RIGHT+P2-B → DEC $4A; START(bit3/$08) → dispatch via SelectDispatchTable

name: Start1P
comment: Start1P: $6C=5; JSR NewGameSetup; JMP GameInit

name: Start2P
comment: Start2P: $6C=7; JSR NewGameSetup; JMP GameInit

name: StartConstruction
comment: StartConstruction: $6C=7; JMP ConstructionEntry ($C0AE)

name: SelectDispatchTable
comment: SelectDispatchTable: ptr16[3]; [0]=$CA6F(1P) [1]=$CA74(2P) [2]=$CA7E(CONSTRUCTION); indexed by $83*2

name: UpdateCursorSprite
comment: UpdateCursorSprite: $98 = $8B + ($83 << 4); sets OAM sprite index for cursor tank

name: SetupNametableStage
comment: SetupNametableStage: JSR ClearSpriteBuf; STA $4D=3; LDA #$1C STA $05; JSR WriteNametable; JSR InitEntities; JSR WaitNMI; RTS. Fills nametable with tile $1C (brick) + palette 3. Background for player-select and brick game-over screen.

name: DrawTitleScreen
comment: DrawTitleScreen: sets nametable $24; draws BATTLE sprite-string at x=26 y=46; CITY at x=60 y=86; BG tiles $D2A5 at col=2 row=3; $D2A8 at col=11 row=3; HI-/SCORE headers; "1 PLAYER" row=17; "2 PLAYERS" row=19; "CONSTRUCTION" row=21; credits names row=23; copyright row=25; all rights row=27

name: NMI
comment: NMI: push A/X/Y/P; OAM DMA $0200→PPU; LDA $2002 (reset addr latch); JSR VRAMNametableFlush ($D8FD
column6: flush buffered nametable writes); if $4D>=0 JSR PaletteUpdate; write PPUCTRL=$B0|$50; scroll X=0 Y=$4F; PPUMASK=$1E; JSR ReadControllers2 ($D689); JSR HideSpritePairs ($DA93
column7: hide unused OAM slots); JSR SoundEngineTick ($EA7E); INC $0B (frame lo); every 64 INC $0A (frame hi); RTI

name: Init
comment: Init: clears $60/$6B/$0C/$0D/$6D; $4D=$FF (skip PPU updates); calls InitRAM; $0E=4; $6E=$20; WriteNametable; HideSpritePairs; ZeroSlot x3; if CheckSavedState: $3F=2 $83=0 (1P); WriteNametable x2; InitEntities; SoundResetInit

name: DevSignature
comment: DevSignature: 16-byte ASCII developer name "RYOUITI OOKUBO  " used as SRAM magic; compared against $0110-$011F to detect soft-reset vs first-boot

name: WriteDefaultConfig
comment: WriteDefaultConfig: LDX #$0F; loop: LDA $C040
column7: X; DEX; BPL loop; RTS — copies 16-byte DevSignature ($C040) into RAM $0110-$011F; called at end of Init so subsequent soft-resets skip state init

name: CheckSavedState
comment: CheckSavedState: compare $0110-$011F with DevSignature at $C040; A=1 if match (soft-reset → saved state valid); A=0 if no match (first power-on → init $3F=2/$83=0)

name: PaletteUpdate
comment: PaletteUpdate: A=$4D (palette set index 0-8). ASL×4 → X=A×16. Y=$10. Set PPU addr $3F00. Write 16 bytes from BGPaletteTable($D565)+X to PPU ($3F00-$3F0F). Then STA $4D=$FF (done flag). Called from NMI when $4D bit7=0 (≥0).

name: SpritePaletteInit
comment: SpritePaletteInit: X=0
column6: Y=$10. Set PPU addr $3F10. Write 16 bytes from SpritePaletteData($D555) to PPU ($3F10-$3F1F). Called once from $9502 at startup (alongside PaletteUpdate index 0).

name: SpritePaletteData
comment: SpritePaletteData: 16 bytes (4 sub-palettes × 4 NES colors)

name: BGPaletteTable
comment: BGPaletteTable: 9 × 16 bytes = 144 bytes; indexed by $4D (0-8); each entry is 4 BG sub-palettes × 4 NES colors
column10: 5-8=flash animation (cycled by $4D = ($0B & 3) + 5 in flash loop at $8486).

name: WaitVBlank2
comment: WaitVBlank2: LDA $2002; BPL loop (spin until VBlank bit7=1). Mirror of WaitVBlank ($D8F6) at lower address. Called before direct PPU writes.

name: ReadControllers2
comment: ReadControllers mirror at $D689 = same code as $9689; reads $4016/$4017 (P1/P2)
column6: edge-detects into $06-$09; called from NMI ($D433) NOT a sound routine despite old label

name: APUSoundInit
comment: APUSoundInit: STA $4015=$0F (enable sq1+sq2+tri+noise); STA $4017=$C0 (5-step frame counter no IRQ); zero 28 channel data blocks at $031C-$03FB (8B each) and $0300-$031B (status array); called at startup

name: SoundEngineTick
comment: SoundEngineTick: NMI-called each frame; $6D!=0→$F5=1 else $F5=28; pointer $F0/$F1=$031C (channel table); first pass scans active channels writes APU $4000+X*4; reads note seqs via $ECAF/ECBE; second pass silences idle channels

name: GetChannelDataPtr
comment: GetChannelDataPtr: X=$F4*2; loads $F2/$F3 from ChannelPtrTable($ECFE); used to point at each channel's note sequence

name: ReadChannelByte
comment: ReadChannelByte: read next byte from note sequence at ($F2)

name: NoteFreqTable
comment: NoteFreqTable: 12 note values (C through B) → APU period hi byte; used to set $4002/$4006/$400A/$400E

name: ChannelPtrTable
comment: ChannelPtrTable: 28 x u16le pointers to note sequence data; indexed by channel number $F4; each ptr points into ROM music/SFX data

name: DrawNametableText
comment: DrawNametableText: CalcNametableAddr; reads ($11)

name: DrawNametableTextOffset
comment: DrawNametableTextOffset: same as DrawNametableText but adds $60 to bytes with bit7=0 (for palette highlight mode)

name: DrawSpriteString
comment: DrawSpriteString: reads ($13)

name: WaitVBlank
comment: WaitVBlank: LDA $0B; CMP $0B; BEQ (spin until frame counter changes)

name: VRAMNametableFlush
comment: VRAMNametableFlush: terminates VRAM update buffer at $0180[$0C]; iterates triplets (addr_hi
column7: data) from $0180[0..$0C) writing to PPU via $2006/$2006/$2007; resets $0C=0. NOT sprite-related — flushes buffered nametable tile writes to PPU.

name: DrawHiScore
comment: DrawHiScore: draws hi-score from $3D-$43 buffer to OAM sprite at X=$10 Y=$64; skips leading zeros (advances X by $20 per zero digit); $60=$30 (score digit tile offset); uses DrawSpriteString.

name: UpdateHiScore
comment: UpdateHiScore: compare P1 score ($15-$1B) to hi-score ($3D-$43); if P1>hi-score copy P1→$3D and set Y=1; then compare P2 ($1D-$23); if P2>hi-score copy P2→$3D Y=$FF; RTS Y=0 if P1 beat it
column7: Y=$FF neither. Called after game-over at $8286.

name: AddScoreDigits
comment: AddScoreDigits: X=player index (0=P1 score $15
column6: 1=P2 score $1D); adds 7-digit BCD value from scratch buffer $35-$3B into player score; X*8+6=offset into $15-based score array; loop DEX/DEY from digit 6 to 0 with decimal carry.

name: SetupScoreDigits
comment: SetupScoreDigits: A=BCD score byte; clears scratch buffer $35-$3B via InitEntitySlot($35); if A=0 → STA $38=1 (1000 pts); else lo nibble→$3A (ones of hundreds)
column6: hi nibble→$39 (tens of hundreds). E.g. A=$10→100pts

name: InitEntitySlot
comment: InitEntitySlot: X=slot index; zero $00
column7: X (7 ZP bytes of entity state); STA $FF→$07
column8: X (marks slot inactive/type=-1); RTS. Called from Init with X=$15(P1) and X=$1D(P2).

name: HideSpritePairs
comment: HideSpritePairs: input $0D=current OAM write ptr (4-byte aligned)
column6: $0E=sprite stride (4). Negates $0E. Iterates backwards from $0D-4 down to OAM offset 4 (sprite 1)
column8: off-screen) to $0200+X each step. Updates $0D=4 on exit. Hides all unused OAM sprite slots after active sprites are written. Called from NMI ($D436) and Init ($94AF). Identical copy at $9A93.

name: WriteSpriteToOAM
comment: WriteSpriteToOAM: LDX $0D; STA $0200+X = $48(Y)
column8: $0200+X+3=$47(X-pos); advance $0D += $0E (stride=4); RTS. Writes one 4-byte OAM entry for the current sprite.

name: HideSpritePairs2
comment: HideSpritePairs2: identical copy of HideSpritePairs ($DA93) at lower mirror address. Same behavior: negate $0E; loop backwards from $0D-4 to OAM+4

name: ReadControllers
comment: ReadControllers: STX $4016 (X=1 strobe hi); STY $4016 (Y=0 strobe lo); read 8 bits from $4016

name: str_WrittenBy
comment: str_WrittenBy: "WRITTEN BY" FF — staff credit header

name: str_CreditsNames
comment: str_CreditsNames: tile indices $60-$68 FF — staff name graphic tiles

name: str_Battle
comment: str_Battle: "BATTLE" FF — sprite tile indices for big logo (used by DrawSpriteString)

name: str_City
comment: str_City: "CITY" FF — sprite tile indices for big logo lower half

name: str_TilePairA
comment: str_TilePairA: $5E $6B FF — 2-tile BG sequence at col=2 row=3 (likely "namcot" logo corner or P1 label prefix)

name: str_TilePairB
comment: str_TilePairB: $5F $6B FF — 2-tile BG sequence at col=11 row=3

name: str_HI
comment: str_HI: "HI" $6B FF — score header HI- ($6B = '-' or special tile)

name: str_Score
comment: str_Score: "SCORE" FF — score label

name: str_1Player
comment: str_1Player: "1 PLAYER" FF — menu option 0

name: str_2Players
comment: str_2Players: "2 PLAYERS" FF — menu option 1

name: str_1PlayerHilit
comment: str_1PlayerHilit: $5E $6B "PLAYER" FF — highlighted 1P option (cursor + text)

name: str_2PlayersHilit
comment: str_2PlayersHilit: $5F $6B "PLAYER" FF — highlighted 2P option

name: str_Construction
comment: str_Construction: "CONSTRUCTION" FF — menu option 2

name: str_Copyright
comment: str_Copyright: "@1980 1985 NAMCO LTD" $69 FF — copyright line ($40='@'=copyright symbol tile)

name: str_AllRights
comment: str_AllRights: "ALL RIGHTS RESERVED" FF

name: str_LivesTile
comment: str_LivesTile: $14 FF — single tile for lives display

name: InterStageScreen
comment: InterStageScreen: $4D=4 (palette 4); JSR CurtainClose($CC90); loop at $C172: JSR DrawStageInter($CA91); checks: $4C!=0→start; Start(bit3/$08)→start; A-held(bit0/$06
column6: every 8fr)→INC $85; B-held(bit1/$06)→DEC $85; $85 wraps 1-35($23). ROM DOES allow stage select via A/B buttons.

name: DrawStageInter
comment: DrawStageInter: CalcNametableAddr(col=12
column6: row=14); writes tiles $23-$27 $11 $11 to nametable; $60=$6E (digit tile offset); JSR Div10($85→stage digits); JSR DrawNametableTextOffset at row=14 col=14; $60=0; RTS. Draws STAGE number over closed curtain background.

name: ResetEntitySlots
comment: ResetEntitySlots: STA $6C=#$05 (reset to 1P count); RTS; called at stage completion before GameOverLoop

name: EnemySpawnTick
comment: EnemySpawnTick: LDA $82 (spawn delay); if non-zero DEC and RTS; else check $7F (enemies remaining); if >0 scan $A0+$6C down to $A0+2 for free slot; if found LDA $84→STA $82; JSR SpawnEnemy ($E363); DEC $7F; else RTS

name: SpawnEnemy
comment: SpawnEnemy: X=slot; if X<2(player) load $E47A[X]→$90
column8: X; JMP $E3A9. If X>=2(enemy): INC $6A(wraps 0-2); posX=$E474[$6A]{$18
column12: X=$F0(spawn anim); PlaceTileBlock at posX/Y with A=$0F(blank).

name: FinalizeEntitySpawn
comment: FinalizeEntitySpawn: called after spawn/death animation; LDA $E47E[X]→$A0
column9: X; JMP $E3FA. If X>=2: find next non-zero type in $8B-$8E via $8F; DEC count; look up EntityTypeTable($E4EC)[(stage-1)*4+$8F]→$A8

name: PlayerMoveTick
comment: PlayerMoveTick: runs for entity slots 0-1 (players) only; checks $0B timing (every 1-2 frames); if $6F
column7: X direction bits; calls $E451 to decode direction; aligns pos to 8px; updates $A0

name: EntityMainLoop
comment: EntityMainLoop: X=7..0; for X>=2: checks $0100 invincibility timer; if $A0
column6: X bit7 set and <$E0: dispatch AI via EntityAIDispatch; for X<2 (players): dispatch every 1-2 frames. Dispatches via $DC3D (AI table lookup).

name: EntityAIDispatch
comment: EntityAIDispatch: Y=(($A0
column7: Y); JMP(ptr). Routes to: $F0-state→$DE55(spawn anim); $E0-state→$DE64(death anim); $A0/$A2-state→$DC7C(movement AI).

name: EntityMovementAI
comment: EntityMovementAI: if X<2(player) skip dir-change check; else if posX&7=0 AND posY&7=0 AND PRNG&$0F=0: JSR SpeedCtrlMove RTS (no move/animBit this frame). Then: dir=($A0
column6: X)&$03; $59=DirDeltaY[dir]×8 $58=DirDeltaX[dir]×8 (probe offsets only NOT movement); $56=posX+dX $57=posY+dY (1px step); 2-probe nametable collision check via $DD6E/$DD76/$D706; if passable: update pos+animBit($DD04→$DD29); if blocked: $DD11→player:animBit toggle; enemy: PRNG&3=0→$DD30(grid-align check+flip180°+no animBit); else bump sound+set bit3+animBit toggle.

name: EntityMovementBlocked
comment: EntityMovementBlocked: reached when collision check fails. X<2(player): BCC $DD29 (toggle animBit only). X>=2(enemy): JSR PRNG; AND #$03; BEQ $DD30 (25%: flip dir 180°); else: LDA #$80 JSR sound; set bit3 in $A0

name: AnimBitToggle
comment: AnimBitToggle: LDA $B0
column7: X. Toggles bit2 of animBit every EntityMovementAI collision-check call (both moved and most blocked cases; NOT on the 25% flip-180° path).

name: BlockedFlipDir
comment: BlockedFlipDir: 25% of blocked enemies. Check $90
column7: X&$07=0 (grid-aligned) for sound gate only; then always: LDA $A0
column9: X (flip direction bits 180°). RTS without animBit toggle.

name: RandomDirChange
comment: RandomDirChange: entity state handler (states $90-$9F via EntityStateTable offset 18). JSR PRNG; AND #$01; BEQ→SpeedCtrlMove(50%); else JSR PRNG AND #$01: ADC #$01 (turn right 25%) or SBC #$01 (turn left 25%) on direction bits.

name: SpawnAnimTick
comment: SpawnAnimTick: INC $A0
column6: X(from $F0 up); after 14 steps(low nibble=$0E): STA $A0
column7: X=$E0(transition to death/2nd-anim state); RTS. First phase of spawn star animation.

name: DeathAnimTick
comment: DeathAnimTick: INC $A0
column6: X(from $E0 up); after 14 steps(low nibble=$0E): JSR FinalizeEntitySpawn($E3B8); RTS. Second phase of spawn anim OR explosion anim → activates entity.

name: EnemyScoreTable
comment: EnemyScoreTable[4]: BCD score per enemy type indexed by type index 0-3; $10=100pts(basic) $20=200pts(fast) $30=300pts(power) $40=400pts(armor). Read at $A81E (in-game kill score).

name: ResultEnemyScoreTable
comment: ResultEnemyScoreTable[4]: same score values as EnemyScoreTable but used on result screen ($8D1C); $10/$20/$30/$40 = 100/200/300/400 BCD per enemy type.

name: DirDeltaX
comment: DirDeltaX[4]: X movement delta per direction. dir0(up)=$00 dir1(left)=$FF(-1) dir2(down)=$00 dir3(right)=$01. Multiplied by 8 for pixel speed.

name: DirDeltaY
comment: DirDeltaY[4]: Y movement delta per direction. dir0(up)=$FF(-1) dir1(left)=$00 dir2(down)=$01 dir3(right)=$00. Multiplied by 8 for pixel speed.

name: EnemySpawnX
comment: EnemySpawnX[3]: enemy spawn X positions (rotated via $6A 0..2): $18(24) $78(120) $D8(216) = left/center/right spawn columns.

name: EnemySpawnY
comment: EnemySpawnY[3]: enemy spawn Y positions: all $18(24) = top row of play area.

name: PlayerSpawnX
comment: PlayerSpawnX[2]: player spawn X: slot0=$58(88) slot1=$98(152).

name: PlayerSpawnY
comment: PlayerSpawnY[2]: player spawn Y: both $D8(216) = bottom area.

name: EntityInitStatus
comment: EntityInitStatus[8]: initial $A0 value per slot after spawn: slots 0-1=$A0(player); slots 2-7=$A2(enemy active).

name: EntityStateTable
comment: EntityStateTable[16×2]: AI function pointers indexed by ($A0

name: EntityTypeTable
comment: EntityTypeTable[35×4]: entity type byte per stage per enemy-type-slot. Values: $80=basic $A0=fast $C0=power $E0→$E3=armor(4-hit). Loaded by FinalizeEntitySpawn via $8F index and $8B-$8E counts. 35 stages × 4 enemy types = 140 bytes ($E4EC–$E577).

name: DrawEnemiesLeft
comment: DrawEnemiesLeft: called after DEC $7F; updates enemy-remaining display

name: GameTickMain
comment: GameTickMain: 14+ subsystem JSR calls per frame: $E181/$DB75/$DBF1/$E1FA/$E02E/$E2A9/$E27C/$E122/$E162/$DB48(EnemySpawnTick)/$E604/$E910/$E70C/$E972/$C972/$DB0B/$C7C8/$C31D; called from GameOverLoop and StageStartSetup game loop.

name: Add16Ptr
comment: Add16Ptr: CLC; ADC $11; STA $11; BCC done; INC $12. Adds A to 16-bit ptr at $11/$12.

name: PlaceTileBlock
comment: PlaceTileBlock: takes nibble in A + pixel XY in $56/$57; maps pixel→nametable addr via $D713; looks up attribute in $DABB[nibble]→$04; updates attr table; writes 4 tiles from $DACB[nibble*4] in 2×2 pattern via $D784; advances ptr by 1/$1F/1.

name: TileAttrTable
comment: TileAttrTable[16]: palette attr per block nibble type. Types 0-4→$00(pal0/brick); 5-9→$03(pal3/steel); A→$01; B→$02; C→$03; D-F→$00(empty).

name: TileTypeTable
comment: TileTypeTable[16*4]: 4 tile indices per block nibble type. 0-3=partial brick ($00/$0F patterns); 4=full brick ($0F×4); 5-8=partial steel ($10/$20 patterns); 9=full steel ($10×4); A=water ($12×4); B=forest ($22×4); C=ice ($21×4); D-F=empty ($00×4).

name: ClearStageCCData
comment: ClearStageCCData: clears $CC-$D5 (10 bytes; stage-specific counters/vars).

name: ClearEntitySlots2
comment: ClearEntitySlots2: clears $A0-$A7 (entity status slots 0-7) and $0103-$010A (entity RAM mirror).

name: LoadStageEnemyCounts
comment: LoadStageEnemyCounts: if $46≠0 use stage 35 ($23) else use $85; Y=(stage-1)*4; load $E578[Y..Y+3]→$8B/$8C/$8D/$8E (4 enemy type counts).

name: StageEnemyCountTable
comment: StageEnemyCountTable[35*4]: 4 enemy-type counts per stage (always sum to 20). Stage 1: [18

name: LoadStageData
comment: LoadStageData: takes stage# in A; $FF→36; ptr=$F07A; advance $5B/stage; decode 13×13 nibble grid (7 bytes/row=13 data+1 pad); call PlaceTileBlock for each nibble at pixel positions (16..208

name: StageDataTable
comment: StageDataTable: 36 entries × $5B (91) bytes = 3276 bytes ($F07A–$FD44). Stages 1–35 at entries 0–34; entry 35 ($FCEB–$FD44) = blank stage (A=$FF). Nibble-encoded 13×13 block grid. Each row=7 bytes (13 data nibbles + 1 padding nibble).

name: EntityTileRead
comment: EntityTileRead: loop 7→0; for each active entity ($A0
column10: X(hi&attr). Reads tile at offset $21: if tile=$21(ice) set $E8
column11: X bit7=ice flag. Saves background tile context for collision/rendering.

name: EntityTileRestore
comment: EntityTileRestore: loop 7→0; reads $E0
column7: X→$12; clears bit7 at nametable offsets $21/$20/$01 (restores background tiles previously saved by EntityTileRead each frame).

name: BulletStateMachine
comment: BulletStateMachine: loops slots 9→0; dispatches per-slot bullet state via BulletDispatch($E4D8)[($CC

name: BulletDispatch
comment: BulletDispatch[16×ptr16]: bullet state machine dispatch table. Indexed by ($CC
column6: X>>3)&$FE. Key entries: Y=0→$DBF0(NOP); Y=8→$E051(move); Y=$C-E→$E112(explosion). See also BulletDispatch2 at $E4E2.

name: BulletMoveStep
comment: BulletMoveStep: LDA $CC
column7: X&1: JSR again (second 2px step). Normal bullet=2px/frame; power bullet ($D6!=0)=4px/frame.

name: BulletApplyDelta
comment: BulletApplyDelta: Y=dir(0-3); $B8
column7: X += DirDeltaY[Y]×2. Moves bullet 2px per call (called once or twice by BulletMoveStep).

name: BulletCountdown
comment: BulletCountdown: DEC $CC
column6: X; if lo nibble≠0 return; else hi nibble -= $10; if 0 → STA $00 (done); else ORA $03. Counts down from $33 to $00 over 9 frames (impact/post-fire cooldown).

name: FireBullet
comment: FireBullet: if $CC
column6: X!=0 → RTS (bullet busy); if X<2 STA $030F=1 (player fire SFX); sets $CC
column8: X&$03); positions bullet at entity pos + dir offset ($B8=90

name: BulletExplosionAnim
comment: BulletExplosionAnim: draws explosion sprite at $B8
column7: X position with tile $B1; called when $CC
column8: X in [$60-$70] range (post-impact explosion animation state).

name: ShovelEagleTick
comment: ShovelEagleTick: if $45(shovel timer)!=0: DEC on frame&$3F==0; if $45<4 and frame&$10!=0 JSR $CB9E(eagle restore); else JSR DrawHUDInit. Then: if $68(eagle health) in (0
column6: $80]: DEC $68; dispatch eagle animation routine via ptr table at $E306 (oscillation animation by health level).

name: EagleAnimTable
comment: EagleAnimTable: ptr16 table for eagle damage animation dispatch; indexed by ($68>>2-5) with abs clamp; entries point to eagle tile draw routines.

name: InvincibilityTick
comment: InvincibilityTick: loops players (slots 0-1); if $89
column6: X (invincibility timer) != 0: DEC every 64 frames (frame&$3F==0); draws shield sprite at entity pos via $DA7B with tile $29+frame&$02*2 (flashing animation).

name: PlayerFireTick
comment: PlayerFireTick: loops players (slots 0-1); if entity active ($A0
column10: X=0; JSR FireBullet($E08C) to spawn new bullet.

name: EnemyFireTick
comment: EnemyFireTick: if $0100(fire inhibit)==0: loops enemy slots 7→2; if entity active: JSR $D44D(PRNG)&$1F==0 (≈1/32 chance per frame per enemy): JSR FireBullet($E08C). Controls random enemy fire rate.

name: PRNG
comment: PRNG: pseudorandom number generator; formula: A=$0F*8-$0F+$0A+$00[$10++]; STA $0F. Returns A=pseudo-random byte. Uses $0F(seed)

name: BulletTerrainCollision
comment: BulletTerrainCollision: loops slots 9→0; if $CC
column8: bit0=0→skip). 4-probe system — all probes at same travel-axis coord
column10: by) always; if A hits brick → Check B=(bx+$65
column12: by-$54) [perp-1] always; if C hits → Check D=(bx-$65-$55
column13: by-$64-$54) [perp-5]. Each probe calls BulletHitCheck→ClearTileBit if brick. On any hit: $CC

name: BulletDirDX
comment: BulletDirDX[4]: bullet X delta per direction (±1 or 0): up=$00 left=$FF down=$00 right=$01.

name: BulletDirDY
comment: BulletDirDY[4]: bullet Y delta per direction (±1 or 0): up=$FF left=$00 down=$01 right=$00.

name: BulletHitCheck
comment: BulletHitCheck: STX $47 STY $48; JSR $D706(get nametable ptr for bullet pos); read tile at ptr; if tile==$C8&$FC (eagle tiles): $68=$27(start eagle damage countdown) STA $030B=1(eagle-hit SFX) STA $030C=1; $CC
column7: X=$33(stop bullet); if tile==$11(steel) and $D6&$02(power bullet): JSR $D784(erase tile)
column8: STA $030C=1(brick-SFX); else if brick($0F): JSR $D743(clear bit); else STA $030D=1(ricochet SFX). Returns A=0(hit) or A=1(through).

name: GetNametablePtr
comment: GetNametablePtr: JSR $D713(pixel→tile: X/=8
column8: Y=lo); Y=0 on exit. Converts pixel (X
column9: Y) to nametable pointer $11/$12 for tile read/write.

name: PixelToTile
comment: PixelToTile: TYA; LSR×3→Y (pixel Y → tile row); TXA; LSR×3→X (pixel X → tile col). Converts 8-bit pixel coordinates to tile-space.

name: WriteNametableByte
comment: WriteNametableByte: STA ($11)
column6: Y (write tile to shadow nametable); buffer triplet (addr_hi=$12+$1C
column8: data=tile) into VRAM flush queue at $0180+$0C; INC $0C×4. Queues a nametable tile write for the next NMI flush.

name: ComputeTileBitmask
comment: ComputeTileBitmask: LDA #1→$00; if $48(pixY)&4: ASL $00 ×2; if $47(pixX)&4: ASL $00. Result $00=1/2/4/8 selects 4×4 pixel sub-quadrant of 8×8 CHR tile (TL/TR/BL/BR based on pixel position bit2). Used by ClearTileBit/CheckTileBit for brick sub-tile destruction.

name: CheckTileBit
comment: CheckTileBit: LDA $00; ORA #$F0; AND ($11)
column6: Y; RTS. Returns non-zero if sub-quadrant bit (from $00) is set in tile byte → brick present here. BEQ at $E6A0 skips BulletHitCheck if result=0 (no terrain).

name: ClearTileBit
comment: ClearTileBit: LDA $00; EOR #$FF; AND ($11)
column6: Y; JSR $D784(write result). Clears the sub-quadrant bit ($00=1/2/4/8) from the CHR tile index at ($11)
column7: Y. Partial brick destruction — tile index encodes which 4×4 sub-quadrants are intact.

name: BulletBulletCollision
comment: BulletBulletCollision: for each active bullet slot (where $5A&$06==0: i.e. player-owned): inner loop over all other slots $5B; if same entity skip; if $CC
column10: Y|<6: destroy both ($CC=0 for both). Enemy bullets canceling player bullets.

name: EnemyBulletPlayerCollision
comment: EnemyBulletPlayerCollision: loops player slots 0-1; if player active: scan enemy slots 7→2; for each with $CC

name: PowerupCollectTick
comment: PowerupCollectTick: if $86(powerup_X)!=0 AND $62==0(not collecting): scan active entities; if |$90
column7: X-$87|<12: $62=50(pickup duration); if $88≥0(powerup valid): A=$50(500pts) JSR SetupScoreDigits; JSR AddScoreDigits; trigger powerup SFX; apply powerup effect.

name: ShovelAnimTick
comment: ShovelAnimTick: if $0108(shovel countdown)!=0 AND $46≠2(not construction): DEC $0108 every frame&$0F==0; if $0108≥$0A: read eagle-surround tile data from $D3D5/$D3D9 tables
column6: accumulate into $0105/$0106; JSR $C947(draw eagle base tiles). Animates steel-border around eagle base during shovel powerup.

name: ShovelTileDX
comment: ShovelTileDX: tile offset X values for shovel eagle-border animation (read by ShovelAnimTick at C972).

name: ShovelTileDY
comment: ShovelTileDY: tile offset Y values for shovel eagle-border animation.

name: PlayerActiveCheck
comment: PlayerActiveCheck: checks if P1 and/or P2 are pressing directional buttons ($06/$07 &$F0≠0) and have active entity ($A0
column6: X≠0); sets $0311=1 if only P1 is active
column7: =0 if both/neither. Used to manage 2-player movement priority.

name: LivesDisplayTick
comment: LivesDisplayTick: draws P1 lives count (and P2 in 2P mode) to HUD sprite area. Reads $51+X (lives)
column8: draws life-icon sprites + digit sprites at Y=$36 row. Loops for both players.

name: PaletteFlashTick
comment: PaletteFlashTick (inlined at $C31D): every 64 frames ($0B&$3F==$20) → $4D=1(alt palette A); every 64 frames ($0B&$3F==$00) → $4D=2(alt palette B). Cycles in-game BG palette variants to create subtle color animation.

name: SpawnDelayInit
comment: SpawnDelayInit: LDA $85; ASL; ASL; STA $00; LDA #$BE; SEC; SBC $00; STA $84 → $84 = 190 - stageNum*4 (stageNum 1-based). If $83≠0 (2P): SBC #$14 → subtract 20 more. Min delay at stage 35=50.

name: EnemySpawnTick
comment: EnemySpawnTick: LDA $82; if non-zero DEC and RTS; if $7F==0 RTS; scan $A0+$6C→$A0+2 for free slot; if found: LDA $84→STA $82

name: StageAdvance1P
comment: StageAdvance1P: INC $85; LDA $85; CMP #$24; if reached cap → LDA #$23; STA $85 (clamp at stage 35); JMP $C172.

name: StageAdvance2P
comment: StageAdvance2P: INC $85; LDA $85; CMP #$47; if ≥71 → reset $85=1 and $46=0 (loop stages 1-70).

name: ShovelAnimInitCheck
comment: ShovelAnimInitCheck: if $68=0 (eagle dead) → STA $0105=$70/$0106=$F0/$0107=0/$0108=$11; elif $80=0 (stage clear) fall-through; elif $51+$52=0 → RTS A=0; else RTS A=1. Initiates ShovelAnimTick spiral on game-end.

name: ShovelPowerupActivate
comment: ShovelPowerupActivate: STA $0108=$0D; STA $0106=$D8; STA $0B=0; RTS — starts ShovelAnimTick countdown on shovel pickup.

name: DrawEagleStar
comment: DrawEagleStar: STA $53 (tile); LDX #$81; JSR $DA7B — draws 2 sprites horizontally at X=$81/$81-8 for Y in caller. Used for enemy-type HUD icons.

name: InitAttrTable
comment: InitAttrTable: Y=0→$3F; writes 64 bytes from ROM $07C0[Y] to VRAM attribute table ($23C0) via $0180 buffer.

name: WriteNametableRow
comment: WriteNametableRow: Y=row; writes full 32-tile row to PPU nametable via $0180 buffer; if $63!=0 fills with $63 (curtain mode); if $63=0 copies from RAM shadow ($0400-$05FF) at nametable addr for row Y. Format: [addrH+$1C

name: CurtainClose
comment: CurtainClose: $63=$11 (steel tile); $57=0 loop to $0F: JSR WriteNametableRow($57) + WriteNametableRow($1D-$57); 16 WaitVBlank iterations; fills entire 30-row nametable with tile $11 from outside in. Called from InterStageScreen ($C159) after setting palette 4. Curtain closing animation.

name: InitNametableFromRAM
comment: InitNametableFromRAM: $63=0; rows $0F→0: JSR WriteNametableRow(row); JSR WriteNametableRow(29-row); copies nametable RAM shadow ($0400-$05FF) to PPU nametable. Curtain opening animation — called from StageStartSetup ($C1EC) to reveal the stage.

name: CalcNametableAddr
comment: CalcNametableAddr: Y=tile-row(0-29); X=page(0/1) → A=hi($04/$05); Y=lo; maps to RAM shadow $0400-$05FF.

name: DrawTitleScreen
comment: DrawTitleScreen: sets nametable $24; sprites "BATTLE"(x=26
column10: HI-score col=14; menu items col=11 rows=17/19/21; credits $60-$68 col=11 row=23; copyright "@..." col=4 row=25; "ALL RIGHTS" col=6 row=27.

name: FindFirstNonZeroScore
comment: FindFirstNonZeroScore: scan RAM from $0000+Y skipping zeros (INY+INX per zero); on non-zero or $FF terminus
column6: STA $12=0/$11=Y (address); X=col offset for DrawNametableTextOffset score rendering.

name: UpdateCursorSprite
comment: UpdateCursorSprite: sets $98 = $83*16+$8B (cursor Y pos); row = 17+$83*2. $B0 bit2 toggled every 4 frames at $C9EF controls tread animation frame (not visibility — tank always drawn).

name: SelectDispatchTable
comment: SelectDispatchTable: 3×2-byte addr table indexed by $83×2; dispatch on START: 0=1P game

name: str_WrittenBy
comment:
str_WrittenBy: "WRITTEN BY" FF — staff credit string; no direct xref in DrawTitleScreen (likely part of credits animation sub-sequence).
0,D28F,str_CreditsNames,data,str_CreditsNames: tile indices $60-$68 FF — staff name graphic tiles drawn at col=11 row=23 by DrawTitleScreen $D24D.
0,D2C6,str_1Player,data,str_1Player: "1 PLAYER" FF — menu option 0; drawn at col=11 row=17.
0,D2CF,str_2Players,data,str_2Players: "2 PLAYERS" FF — menu option 1; drawn at col=11 row=19.
0,D2EB,str_Construction,data,str_Construction: "CONSTRUCTION" FF — menu option 2; drawn at col=11 row=21.
0,D2F8,str_Copyright,data,str_Copyright: $40+"1980 1985 NAMCO LTD"+$69 FF — copyright line; drawn at col=4 row=25.
0,D320,str_AllRights,data,str_AllRights: "ALL RIGHTS RESERVED" FF — drawn at col=6 row=27.
0,D3B1,str_CursorArrow,data,str_CursorArrow: $5B FF — cursor/arrow glyph tile used in tally screen and player-select cursor.
0,8CD4,ResultScreen,,ResultScreen: entry point for stage-clear result/tally screen; sums kills into $7D/$7E; calls CEF7 (static strings init); loops $5A=0–3 per enemy type; JSR D0B8 draws eagle-star sprites; tally animates kill counts; 2P check at $8D99.
0,CEF7,ResultScreenInit,,ResultScreenInit: draws static strings for result screen; sets $6B=1/$05=$24/$60=$30/$4D=3; calls DrawNametableText for HI-SCORE(col8 row3)/STAGE"(col12 row5)/"I-PLAYER"(col3 row7); tile $5B arrows at col14 rows 12/15/18/21; "PTS" at col8 rows 12/15/18/21; separator $D3BB at col12 row22; "TOTAL" $D3B5 at col6 row23.

name: str_Separator
comment: str_Separator: 7x tile $5C FF — horizontal-rule separator drawn at col=12 row=22 on result screen.

name: str_Total
comment: str_Total: "TOTAL" FF — drawn at col=6 row=23 on result screen.

name: str_RightArrow
comment: str_RightArrow: $5D FF — right-pointing arrow tile; drawn at col=17 rows 12/15/18/21 in 2P result screen.

name: str_Stage
comment: str_Stage: "STAGE" FF — drawn at col=12 row=5 on result screen ($CF44).

name: CalcDirToTarget
comment: CalcDirToTarget: reads player target pos ($71/$72) and entity pos ($90/$98
column6: X); computes combined direction index $64 (0-8); 50% chance to use set-1 (prefer-X) for enemies; LDA $E486

name: SpeedCtrlMove
comment: SpeedCtrlMove: AI goal selector based on stage difficulty; loads $84>>2 then >>3; compares against $0A; phase1→$B0(chase eagle); phase2→random dir ($A0-$A3 via PRNG&3); phase3→$C0/$D0 (chase player 0/1). Called from EntityMovementAI ($DC7C) on grid tick.

name: DirToStateTable
comment: DirToStateTable: 18-byte direction lookup table (2 sets × 9 entries); indexed by (signY+1)*3+(signX+1) ± 9; values $A0-$A3 encode entity direction state. Used by CalcDirToTarget ($DDA0) via LDA $E486

name: GameOverBrickScreen
comment: GameOverBrickScreen: STA $4D=3 (palette 3); JSR ClearSpriteBuf; LDA #$1C STA $05; JSR WriteNametable (fill nametable with tile $1C bricks); JSR InitEntities; JSR WaitNMI; draws GAME/OVER large sprites at center screen; STA $0318=$0319=$031A=1 (hold flags); loop: WaitVBlank + check $08&#0C (Start/Select pressed → exit) + BNE $0318 (loop while non-zero); on exit: ClearSpriteBuf/WriteNametable/InitEntities/WaitNMI/APUSoundInit; RTS.

name: GameOverWaitLoop
comment: GameOverWaitLoop: JSR WaitVBlank; LDA $08 AND #$0C (Start/Select) BNE exit; LDA $0318 BNE loop; exit: JSR ClearSpriteBuf+WriteNametable+InitEntities+WaitNMI+APUSoundInit; RTS. Waits for button or $0318 auto-decrement before returning.

name: HiScoreEntryScreen
comment: HiScoreEntryScreen: new hi-score entry sequence. Draws "HI-SCORE" label + hi-score value; loops with palette flash ($4D = ($0B&3)+5 cycling sets 5-8); waits for input; called from $828C only when UpdateHiScore returns Y≠0 (new record).

name: ResultScreenBank1
comment: ResultScreenBank1: mirror of ResultScreen at $8CD4 (NROM-128 mirror). Same code: sums kills→$7D/$7E; calls $CEF7(ResultScreenInit); loops 4 enemy types; displays tally. Called from $8256 (post-game path).

name: ResultScreenExit
comment: ResultScreenExit: LDX #$78; JSR WaitFrames (120 frames hold); LDA #$00 STA $50 STA $60 STA $6B STA $4D; RTS. Clears display vars and returns from result screen.

name: WaitFrames
comment: WaitFrames: X = frame count to wait; loop: JSR WaitVBlank + JSR $D0B8; DEX; BNE loop; RTS. Generic frame-delay utility. Called throughout with X=$08/$14/$1E/$78 etc.

name: BonusLifeCheck
comment: BonusLifeCheck: if 2P game ($68=$80): if P1 $66=0 and $17≥2 → INC $51 INC $66; elif $67=0 and $1F≥2 → INC $52 INC $67; if life awarded: STA $0304=$0305=1 (bonus-life sprite trigger). RTS. Called after each kill-row tally in ResultScreen.

name: PostGameAnimLoop
comment: PostGameAnimLoop: post-game animation loop called from 2P stage path. Clears $0A/$0B; loops: WaitVBlank+$C2A2+GameTickMain+$E23B+$DEA6+$E0D8+PaletteFlashTick until $0A=2 (~128 frames). Then: JSR APUSoundInit; JSR ResultScreen($CCD4) → tally screen; falls through to StageAdvance2P($8259).

name: ConstructionEagleWallDraw
comment: ConstructionEagleWallDraw: draws brick/steel eagle-border patterns via DrawNametableText + attr table writes at $07F3/$07F4

name: ConstructionEagleWallDraw2
comment: ConstructionEagleWallDraw2: second variant; draws eagle patterns at col=14 rows 26-27; writes attr $07F3=$3F $07F4|=$33

name: str_ThisProgramWas
comment: str_ThisProgramWas: "THIS PROGRAM WAS" FF — staff credit line

name: str_OpenReach
comment: str_OpenReach: "OPEN-REACH" FF — staff credit (company/team name)

name: str_Game
comment: str_Game: "GAME" FF — game-over text

name: str_Over
comment: str_Over: "OVER" FF — game-over text

name: str_WhoLovesNoriko
comment: str_WhoLovesNoriko: "WHO LOVES NORIKO" FF — Easter egg string (dev personal message)

name: str_PTS
comment: str_PTS: "PTS" FF — tally screen points label

name: EagleWallBrickPattern
comment: EagleWallBrickPattern: 7×(6+FF) tile rows; empty/$0F-brick border + $C8/$CA/$C9/$CB eagle tiles; used by ConstructionEagleWallDraw

name: EagleWallSteelPattern
comment: EagleWallSteelPattern: 7×(6+FF) tile rows; $10-steel variant of eagle wall pattern

name: str_Bonus
comment: str_Bonus: "BONUS" $15 FF — bonus life text on result screen

name: CollisionProbeX
comment: CollisionProbeX: CMP $56; BCC +3; SEC SBC #$01; RTS — collision boundary check helper

name: CollisionProbeY
comment: CollisionProbeY: CMP $57; BCC +3; SEC SBC #$01; RTS — collision boundary check helper

name: AITargetP1
comment: AITargetP1: load P1 pos ($90/$98)→$71/$72; JMP CalcDirToTarget

name: AITargetP2
comment: AITargetP2: load P2 pos ($91/$99)→$71/$72; JMP CalcDirToTarget

name: AITargetEagle
comment: AITargetEagle: load eagle pos ($78/$D8)→$71/$72; JMP CalcDirToTarget

name: CalcDirToTarget
comment: CalcDirToTarget: computes direction from entity to ($71/$72); abs-delta weighting; indexes DirToStateTable($E486)

name: EntityDrawLoop
comment: EntityDrawLoop: loops $5A=0→7; JSR EntitySpriteRender per slot

name: EntitySpriteRender
comment: EntitySpriteRender: dispatches sprite drawing via $E4B8 table based on $A0

name: EntitySpriteDispatch
comment: EntitySpriteDispatch: 16×ptr16; sprite rendering dispatch indexed by entity state ($A0>>3)&$FE

name: PowerupSpriteDraw
comment: PowerupSpriteDraw: draws powerup icon at ($86/$87) if active; blinks every 8fr; DEC $62 timer; clears $86 when expired

name: PowerupSpawn
comment: PowerupSpawn: PRNG→random pos $86/$87 via $E902 grid-snap; PRNG→$88 type(0-7 from $E8FA); SFX $0309=1

name: PowerupTypeTable
comment: PowerupTypeTable[8]: powerup type weights [0 1 2 3 4 5 4 3]

name: PowerupGridSnap
comment: PowerupGridSnap: A=PRNG&3→grid-snapped pixel coord (A*10+6)*2

name: PowerupEffectTable
comment: PowerupEffectTable: 5×ptr16 dispatch for powerup effects

name: SetInvincibility
comment: SetInvincibility: STA $89

name: FreezeEnemies
comment: FreezeEnemies: STA $0100=$0A (freeze timer)

name: ShovelActivate
comment: ShovelActivate: JSR $CB9E (steel wall); STA $45=$14 (20-unit timer)

name: UpgradeArmor
comment: UpgradeArmor: $0101

name: KillAllEnemies
comment: KillAllEnemies: loop slots 7→2; if active+not-armor: set $A0=$73(death state); SFX $030A=1

name: ExtraLife
comment: ExtraLife: INC $51

name: SoundSequenceData
comment: SoundSequenceData: 714 bytes of note/SFX sequence data for 28 APU channels; referenced by ChannelPtrTable($ECFE)

name: ConstructionDefaultMap
comment: ConstructionDefaultMap: $9D header + 9×$FF + ~513 bytes grid ($2E/$40 values) + $FF padding; unreferenced remnant
